de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.lang

Class SMTTermCall

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.lang.SMTTerm
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.lang.SMTTermCall

  • public class SMTTermCall
extends SMTTerm
    SMTLib supports functions as well as predicates. We only use functions and represent predicates as boolean valued functions. As consequence a function application can build a term as well as a formula.
    Author:
    Aboubakr Achraf El Ghazi
